rationale: For a municipal service 'Uber for Garbage' app, the UI must balance absolute authority and clarity (Swiss High-Contrast) with the urgency of logistics. Using Stark White, Asphalt Gray, and Safety Orange instead of cliché 'eco-green' makes it feel like a modern, serious operations tool while remaining approachable for residents.

layout_and_spacing.containers: Padding p-6 or p-8 inside bordered containers.
layout_and_spacing.dashboards: Control Room Grid: Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Every pixel utilized, h-full on children.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense content and forms. Center-align only major empty states or single CTA screens.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1).
surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Crystal Glass: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-black/5. 1px delicate inner stroke.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons: Sharp corners or max 4px radius. High contrast.

components.strategy: Shadcn UI heavily customized for .js/.jsx usage. Sharp edges (rounded-sm or rounded-none). Flat UI, no card shadows, only 1px borders.
components.inputs: Shadcn inputs with strict validation states. Sharp corners.
components.maps: Integrate Google Maps with a custom SnazzyMaps style (high-contrast grayscale with bright orange/blue accents for routes).
components.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for high-end duotone or bold fill.

interactions.hover: Explicit hover states with color shifts (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
interactions.focus: High contrast focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none).

accessibility_and_testing.testing: MANDATORY data-testid attributes on ALL interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='pickup-request-form').

image_urls.description: Modern orange garbage truck parked on road
Bird's eye view of city map
Compressed bales of mixed paper waste / texture

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use Outfit for headings and Manrope for body. Apply from Google Fonts.
Implement Google Maps for Resident ETA tracking and Driver route mapping.
All components must be configured for .jsx / JavaScript React, not TypeScript.
All forms MUST use customized Shadcn UI elements with sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm).
Avoid generic green/eco branding. Stick to the stark white, deep black, and safety orange palette to convey a modern logistics/ops feel.
Driver and Admin dashboards must utilize the 'Control Room' dense grid pattern, prioritizing operational action over static reporting.
Always apply 'data-testid' to critical elements (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='map-marker-truck', data-testid='special-pickup-form').
